DeGrain v1.0.0 by FLEXTASY — Installation Instructions
=======================================================

INSTALLATION:
1. Double-click "Degrain-by-FLEXTASY.pkg"
2. Follow the installation prompts (Welcome → ReadMe → Install)
3. Enter your Mac password when asked
4. DeGrain will be installed to:
   - VST3: ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/Degrain.vst3
   - AU:   ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/Degrain.component

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FIRST USE — ALLOW IN macOS (IMPORTANT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

macOS will block DeGrain on first load (plugin is not notarized).
Do this once per format:

1. Load DeGrain in your DAW — macOS shows a security warning
2. Open System Settings > Privacy & Security
3. Scroll down → click "Open Anyway" next to DeGrain
4. Click "Open" in the dialog
5. Reload DeGrain in your DAW — it will work now

Do this for VST3 and AU separately if you use both.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FIND DeGrain IN YOUR DAW
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Logic Pro:  Scan plugins → Audio Units > Effect > LexDev > Degrain
Ableton:    Preferences > Plug-ins → rescan → VST3 folder
Bitwig:     Settings > Plug-ins → rescan

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
UNINSTALL
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Delete these files and restart your DAW:
  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/Degrain.vst3
  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/Degrain.component

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
